mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_config_params t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.param_code like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramCode},'%')
AND t.param_value like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramValue},'%')
AND t.param_type like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramType},'%')
AND t.param_remark like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramRemark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_config_params t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.param_code like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramCode},'%')
AND t.param_value like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramValue},'%')
AND t.param_type like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramType},'%')
AND t.param_remark like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.paramRemark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_post like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createPost},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{configParamsEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_config_params t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
